units.content: second classifier receives a coupling group of records whose source tag carries the third predetermined value and whose structured pointers reference a hypothesis inference step
said records represent an adoption of the hypothesis inference step by automated actors
second classifier analyzes dynamics of convergence of measurement records against values predicted by the hypothesis inference step, over the coupling group and subsequent records in storage
second classifier emits a mode annotation taking one of at least four predetermined values
first mode is characterized by absence of systematic convergence or divergence
second mode is characterized by convergence of measurements toward hypothesis predictions with direction of causation from measurement to hypothesis
third mode is characterized by convergence of measurements toward hypothesis predictions with direction of causation from hypothesis to subsequent measurement
fourth mode is characterized by divergence of measurements away from hypothesis predictions subsequent to a period of convergence
